_readme: Accounts YourScore watches ONLY as a signal of what's actually happening in football right now. We do NOT reword their tweets or repost their photos - we write our own genuine reaction. 'note' steers the angle for that account. 'perRun' overrides how many new tweets to consider per run; keep it low, we post a few great things not many average ones.

accounts.note: Signals the big live moment. React as fans to what just happened on the pitch, in our own words.
Signals the night's talking point. If there's a genuine debate a knowledge crew would enjoy, that's our angle.
Signals the real result or story. Only the genuine football moment, never programming/schedule posts. Our own take, never a news summary.
Signals a record or milestone that might be a natural knowledge/trivia hook (which player, who scored, what record) - but lead with the human reaction, never a data dump.
